MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Tenderloin Housing Clinic is present. Represented by Jesus Lopez
Attorney, Arnold Evje, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Andrea Player, is present.
Attorney,Elisabeth Derby, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Dennis Hyde, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 305B, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of MAY-24-2010 is vacated.
